title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE DAVAO REGIONAL HOSPITAL INTO DAVAO REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER, INCREASING ITS BED CAPACITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7179

chunks.text:
H. No. 67; Manila Bulletin, August 28, 2015; 111 OG No. 41, 6004 (October 12, 2015)

[ REPUBLIC ACT No. 10678, August 26, 2015 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE DAVAO REGIONAL HOSPITAL INTO DAVAO REGIONAL MEDICAL CENTER, INCREASING ITS BED CAPACITY AND APPROPRIATING FUNDS THEREFOR, AMENDING FOR THE PURPOSE REPUBLIC ACT NO. 7179

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Republic Act No. 7179 is hereby amended by inserting a new Section 1 to read as follows:

ГўВЂВњSECTION 1. The Davao Regional Hospital in Tagum City is hereby converted into a medical training center to be known as Davao Regional Medical Center with a capacity of six hundred (600) beds.ГўВЂВќ

SEC. 2. Section 1 of the same Act is hereby deleted.

SEC. 3. Section 2 of the same Act is hereby amended to read as follows:

ГўВЂВњSEC. 2. The amount necessary to carry out the provisions of this Act shall be charged to the appropriations of the Department of Health. Thereafter, such amount as may be necessary for the operation and maintenance of the hospital shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.ГўВЂВќ

SEC. 4. A new Section 3 is hereby inserted to read as follows:

ГўВЂВњSEC. 3. The increase in bed capacity of the Davao Regional Hospital from two hundred (200) to six hundred (600) beds shall be immediately implemented upon the approval of this Act.ГўВЂВќ

SEC. 5. This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette

or in any newspaper of general circulation.

Approved,

(SGD.) FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

(SGD.) FRANKLIN M. DRILON

President of the Senate

Senate Bill No. 2655, which, was approved by the Senate on May 25, 2015, was adopted as an amendment to House Bill No. 67 by the House of Representatives on June 3, 2015.

(SGD.) MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

(SGD.) OSCAR G. YABES

Secretary of the Senate

Approved: AUG 26 2015

(SGD.) BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
